title: US2 dashboard UI: hierarchy tree, create sub-business, move, archive/restore, rename, delete
description: Surface the US2 backend (sub-business create/move/archive/restore/rename/delete) in the Angular dashboard. Build a tree view from GET /businesses (parent_id), per-node actions, confirmations. Test-first: vitest unit test for the tree builder + Playwright e2e for the hierarchy flows against the running stack.
close_reason: US2 dashboard UI built (tree/create-sub/move/archive/restore/rename/delete), unit + e2e + prod build green, verified live via Playwright MCP

title: US5 T077: account lifecycle (deactivate/delete/export)
description: T077. internal/account/lifecycle.go: account deactivate, delete (erasure schedule + last-Owner refuse), personal-data export (FR-028 GDPR; anonymize PII, preserve pseudonymized audit). Test-first.

title: US5 T078: complete auth flows
description: T078. internal/account/auth.go+handler.go: email-change request/confirm, password-reset confirm, magic-link request/consume (single-use jti tokens). Test-first.

title: US5 T076: audit read endpoint
description: T076. GET /businesses/{id}/audit — paginated, audit.read gate, no cross-tenant leak. internal/audit/handler.go or tenancy/audit_handler.go. Test-first.
close_reason: T075 transfer-ownership (Owner-only, tenant-root-only, atomic promote+demote, audited) + T076 audit read (GET /businesses/{id}/audit, audit.read gate, keyset pagination, metadata-only). Tests green; lint + full tenancy integration clean.

title: US5 T075: transfer ownership
description: T075. internal/tenancy/ownership.go: POST /businesses/{id}/transfer-ownership — Owner-only, {id} MUST be tenant root (else 409), atomic under tenant lock (grant new Owner + demote old in one tx; deferred tenant_owner_guard backstop), audited. FR-024. Test-first.
close_reason: T075 transfer-ownership (Owner-only, tenant-root-only, atomic promote+demote, audited) + T076 audit read (GET /businesses/{id}/audit, audit.read gate, keyset pagination, metadata-only). Tests green; lint + full tenancy integration clean.

title: US5 T074: agent-principal containment regression
description: T074 [P]. internal/security_regression/agent_containment_test.go: agent principal has no cross-business reach and no admin perms (SC-011/FR-027). Guards exist in migration 0004 (membership_agent_guard).
close_reason: T074 agent-containment regression: behavioral (membership_agent_guard) + source pin, both green

title: US5 T073: integration change/revoke/transfer atomic + audited
description: T073 [P]. internal/tenancy/ownership_test.go: change/revoke/transfer atomic; last-Owner -> 409 (FR-014/024); all mutations audited (SC-005).

title: US5 T072: contract tests transfer-ownership + audit
description: T072 [P]. internal/tenancy/ownership_contract_test.go: HTTP contract tests for POST /businesses/{id}/transfer-ownership (tenant-root only, Owner-only, 204/404/409) and GET /businesses/{id}/audit (paginated, audit.read).

title: US4 T070: leave business
description: T070. internal/tenancy/members.go: leave business voluntarily (FR-018, last-owner protected). Test-first.
close_reason: T069 revoke + T070 leave in members.go: members.manage gate (revoke) / self-service (leave), direct-membership-only, last-Owner protected, audited, no-oracle. Tests green; lint clean.

title: US4 T071: oracle hardening + rate-limit wiring
description: T071. internal/account/ + internal/invitations/: uniform responses + fixed-cost paths across auth/invite + rate-limit wiring (SC-010, FR-026/029).
close_reason: T067 oracle-timing regression suite (login miss/wrong-pw/deactivated uniform + fixed-cost + verify/accept uniformity + source pins) and T071 hardening (deactivated-login denial closes account-state oracle; httpx.RateLimit per-IP wired on public auth routes via TokenBucket + config knobs). Full integration + lint green.

title: US4 T069: revoke membership
description: T069. internal/tenancy/members.go: revoke membership (members.manage, last-owner protected, effective immediately, audited). Test-first.
close_reason: T069 revoke + T070 leave in members.go: members.manage gate (revoke) / self-service (leave), direct-membership-only, last-Owner protected, audited, no-oracle. Tests green; lint clean.

title: US4 T068: access list GET /businesses/{id}/members
description: T068. internal/tenancy/members.go: GET /businesses/{id}/members with direct/inherited provenance (grants[] union), members.read gate, no cross-tenant PII (FR-030). Test-first.
close_reason: T068 GET /businesses/{id}/members access list with direct/inherited provenance (grants[] union + effective_permissions), members.manage|audit.read gate (FR-016), no-oracle 404, PII-minimized (display_name only, FR-030). Inherited grants read via SECURITY DEFINER access_list() (migration 0011) since ancestor memberships are RLS-hidden from sub-business admins. TestAccessList 3 subtests green; lint+integration clean.

title: US4 T067: oracle-timing test
description: T067 [P]. internal/security_regression/oracle_test.go: shape+latency indistinguishable across login miss/wrong-pw/deactivated/unverified/invalid/expired/reused invite (SC-010).
close_reason: T067 oracle-timing regression suite (login miss/wrong-pw/deactivated uniform + fixed-cost + verify/accept uniformity + source pins) and T071 hardening (deactivated-login denial closes account-state oracle; httpx.RateLimit per-IP wired on public auth routes via TokenBucket + config knobs). Full integration + lint green.

title: US4 T066: revoke -> access gone test
description: T066 [P]. internal/security_regression/revocation_test.go: revoke member -> access gone on next action (SC-004). Pairs with T069 revoke impl (test-first).
close_reason: US4 isolation/RLS regression suite green: T064 rls_matrix (read+write deny across all RLS tables x non-auth contexts), T065 isolation (cross-tenant ops -> 404), T066 revocation (immediate access loss SC-004). lint clean.

title: US4 T065: two-tenant 0% cross-visibility test
description: T065 [P]. internal/security_regression/isolation_test.go: two tenants 0% cross-visibility; cross-tenant GET -> 404 (SC-002/003).
close_reason: US4 isolation/RLS regression suite green: T064 rls_matrix (read+write deny across all RLS tables x non-auth contexts), T065 isolation (cross-tenant ops -> 404), T066 revocation (immediate access loss SC-004). lint clean.

title: US4 T064: RLS matrix test
description: T064 [P]. internal/security_regression/rls_matrix_test.go: every tenant table x CRUD with absent/malformed/sideways/cross-root principal context; assert app-predicate AND RLS separately, as the non-bypass manyforge_app role.
close_reason: US4 isolation/RLS regression suite green: T064 rls_matrix (read+write deny across all RLS tables x non-auth contexts), T065 isolation (cross-tenant ops -> 404), T066 revocation (immediate access loss SC-004). lint clean.

title: US3 escalation security-regression suite (FR-023 at assign/edit/accept)
description: T056. internal/security_regression/escalation_test.go: escalation refused at role-assign, role-edit, and invite-accept. make sec-test gate.
close_reason: T055/T056: consolidated FR-023 escalation regression suite in internal/security_regression/escalation_test.go (assign via ChangeMemberRole, edit via UpdateRole, invite via Create) as real manyforge_app role + source-level pins (escalation_pin_test.go, runs in make test AND make sec-test) covering assign/edit/invite/accept. All green.

title: US3 invitations & accept: create/list/revoke/resend + auth-bound single-use accept
description: T060-T062 + tests T053(invitations)/T054. invitations package: create (role <= inviter, hashed token), list, revoke, resend (throttled); accept (auth-bound + verified + email-match + re-validate authority/role/active + single-use, 410 on reuse + membership + audit). Test-first.
close_reason: Invitations create/list/revoke/resend + auth-bound single-use accept implemented. SECURITY DEFINER accept_invitation (migration 0010) handles the RLS-exempt atomic accept (invitee not yet a member). 10/10 integration subtests green (accept->scoped access, single-use 410, email-mismatch 403, unverified 403, revoke, resend rotation, escalation-at-create 409).

title: US3 change member role (members.manage, escalation guard, immediate)
description: T063. internal/tenancy/members.go: change-member-role handler+service enforcing members.manage, escalation refused (role <= actor), effective immediately. Test-first.
close_reason: T063 PATCH /businesses/{id}/members/{principalId} ChangeMemberRole: members.manage gate, escalation guard (FR-023 incl. Owner-reserved), last-Owner protection (FR-014/024), audited, no-oracle. 6 integration subtests green; lint+sec-test clean.

title: US3 roles & permissions: GET /permissions + role CRUD (presets + custom, escalation/superset guard, delete-in-use refused)
description: T057-T059 + tests T053(roles)/T055/T056. authz package: permission catalog endpoint, role service with tenant_root_id derived from path, superset/escalation check (role <= actor), delete-in-use refused (FR-025), exactly-permitted enforcement (SC-009). Test-first.
close_reason: US3 roles & permissions fully shipped: GET /permissions (T057), role CRUD presets+custom with superset/escalation guard + delete-in-use refused (T058/T059), role/permission contract tests (T053), escalation regression suite (T055/T056, manyforge-9au). lint+test+sec-test green.

title: US2 HTTP-level contract tests for mutation routes (move/archive/restore/delete/rename)
description: HANDOFF flagged T045 coverage is service-level; add HTTP contract tests for the US2 mutation routes in internal/tenancy to pin the wire contract (status codes, bodies, error shapes). Out of the UI scope; backend follow-up.
close_reason: Added internal/tenancy/hierarchy_contract_test.go — HTTP-level contract for create-sub/rename/move/archive/restore/delete + error shapes (400/404/409/401). 16 subtests pass; full tenancy integration suite + lint green.

title: SPA design pass: cohesive design system over the dashboard/auth pages
description: Apply a polished, cohesive design system (spacing scale, typography, tree affordances, buttons, states) to the existing dark theme without regressing behavior. Verify in a real browser.
close_reason: Cohesive design system applied (tokens, tree affordances, focus states, chrome); behavior unchanged, all tests + build green, verified live

title: US1/US2 UI polish: refresh-token auto-renew interceptor + empty/error states
description: Add silent access-token refresh on 401 in the HTTP interceptor (single-flight, retry once, logout on refresh failure) and nicer empty/error states across pages. Test-first: vitest for the refresh interceptor; Playwright for session-survives-expiry.
close_reason: Refresh-token auto-renew interceptor (single-flight) + recoverable load error; unit + e2e + build green

title: Plan: agent principal containment + autonomy gate
description: Single home business, no cross-subtree inheritance, no admin permissions; server-side Mode-1 autonomy gate after RBAC. Principle IV, FR-027, SC-011. See plan-inputs.md.
close_reason: Planning decision resolved and captured in specs/001-tenant-foundation/{research,plan,data-model}.md; implemented across US1-US3. Parent epic manyforge-5zt stays open for US4/US5/polish.

title: Plan: concurrency for hierarchy mutations
description: Serialize overlapping move/archive/restore/delete (FOR UPDATE / advisory locks on tenant_root_id); deterministic 409 conflict; no orphaning; acyclic invariant. FR-031. See plan-inputs.md.
close_reason: Planning decision resolved and captured in specs/001-tenant-foundation/{research,plan,data-model}.md; implemented across US1-US3. Parent epic manyforge-5zt stays open for US4/US5/polish.

title: Plan: lifecycle/GDPR + abuse limits
description: Soft-delete + retention/purge; GDPR erasure with pseudonymized append-only audit; cursor pagination + max page size; rate-limit buckets; email bounce suppression. FR-028/029. See plan-inputs.md.
close_reason: Planning decision resolved and captured in specs/001-tenant-foundation/{research,plan,data-model}.md; implemented across US1-US3. Parent epic manyforge-5zt stays open for US4/US5/polish.

title: Plan: auth & sessions + oracle hardening
description: Token TTLs, refresh rotation/reuse response, session/logout revocation, argon2id/magic-link hashing, email-change re-verify, recovery; fixed-cost sign-in/up + rate limits. FR-001/026/029, SC-010. See plan-inputs.md.
close_reason: Planning decision resolved and captured in specs/001-tenant-foundation/{research,plan,data-model}.md; implemented across US1-US3. Parent epic manyforge-5zt stays open for US4/US5/polish.

title: Plan: permission-resolution algorithm
description: Effective permissions = union of direct+inherited grants; archived-ancestor handling; no-grant-above-own-level (FR-023); scale within SC-007. FR-010/019/021. See plan-inputs.md.
close_reason: Planning decision resolved and captured in specs/001-tenant-foundation/{research,plan,data-model}.md; implemented across US1-US3. Parent epic manyforge-5zt stays open for US4/US5/polish.

title: Plan: RLS operational contract
description: SET LOCAL principal/subtree context, FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY, non-bypass app role, pool hygiene, fail-closed tests; app-predicate AND RLS independently deny. Principle I, FR-011/012. See plan-inputs.md.
close_reason: Planning decision resolved and captured in specs/001-tenant-foundation/{research,plan,data-model}.md; implemented across US1-US3. Parent epic manyforge-5zt stays open for US4/US5/polish.

title: Plan: hierarchy storage + tenant_root_id
description: Closure table (ancestor_id,descendant_id,depth,tenant_root_id) + parent_id; transactional move/closure rewrite; in-tx cycle check; cross-root move rejection. FR-004/005/006/012, SC-007. See plan-inputs.md.
close_reason: Planning decision resolved and captured in specs/001-tenant-foundation/{research,plan,data-model}.md; implemented across US1-US3. Parent epic manyforge-5zt stays open for US4/US5/polish.

title: Tenant Foundation (spec 001)
description: First feature for ManyForge: accounts, master->sub-business hierarchy, capability-catalog RBAC, AI-agent principals, tenant isolation, audit trail. Spec: specs/001-tenant-foundation/spec.md (31 FRs, 11 SCs). Plan-level decisions to resolve in /speckit-plan: specs/001-tenant-foundation/plan-inputs.md.

value:

manyforge 001-tenant-foundation US5 IN PROGRESS (US1-US4 fully done; see manyforge-001-tenant-foundation-51-85-tasks-branch note). Branch 001-tenant-foundation, NO remote, ~33 commits. US5 issues created with deps. DONE+closed: T075 transfer-ownership=xvv (internal/tenancy/ownership.go: POST /businesses/{id}/transfer-ownership, Owner-only via HasOwnerRole, tenant-root-only else 409, atomic promote new owner + demote old to admin under AcquireTenantLock, deferred tenant_owner_guard backstop, new owner must be human direct root member, audited ownership.transferred; new queries PresetRoleID+GetPrincipalKind); T076 audit-read=x7h (internal/tenancy/audit_handler.go: GET /businesses/{id}/audit, audit.read gate, keyset pagination on (created_at,id) newest-first via base64 cursor 'RFC3339Nano|uuid', first-page sentinel year-9999+maxFFuuid, metadata-only no new_value; query ListAuditEntries; AuditEntry type). Tests TestTransferOwnership+TestAuditRead in internal/tenancy. REMAINING US5 (all open): T072 contract tests transfer+audit=ws9 (NOW UNBLOCKED, internal/tenancy/ownership_contract_test.go HTTP-level); T073 integration atomic+audited=61e (NOW UNBLOCKED, internal/tenancy/ownership_test.go — note largely covered by existing TestChangeMemberRole/Revoke/Transfer/AuditRead, T073 wants consolidated atomicity+SC-005 audit test); T074 agent-containment=1da (internal/security_regression/agent_containment_test.go, guards already in migration 0004 membership_agent_guard: agent one membership at home only, no admin perms FR-027/SC-011); T077 account lifecycle=4wa (LARGE: internal/account/lifecycle.go deactivate/delete/export, GDPR erasure anonymize PII + preserve pseudonymized audit, last-Owner refuse, FR-028); T078 auth flows=sy2 (LARGE: internal/account/auth.go email-change req/confirm, password-reset confirm, magic-link req/consume, single-use jti). THEN polish T079-T085 (bench, source-pins T080, playwright e2e, openapi drift, docs, main wiring, mark 5zt resolved). Run/handoff specs/001-tenant-foundation/HANDOFF.md.
